data.name: Tales of Legendary Lust: Lewd Dungeon Runs
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a gorgeous fantasy world full of hand-painted erotica as you take control of Captain Hale, a renowned hero and adventurer! Assemble your party of all-female companions, and lead them as you explore sex dungeons full of hidden treasure and horny denizens...

Main Features:

  • Explore a mystical world full of magic and wonder.

  • Unlock multiple sex scenes and spicy, lewd encounters.

  • Diverse cast of horny female vixens to seduce and sleep with.

  • Written erotica featuring an expansive set of hot kinks & fetishes.

  • Beautiful hand-painted visuals inspired by 80s fantasy art & hentai.

  • Main plot with plenty of lewd adventuring and fleshed-out characters.

  • Sultry and seductive voice-overs for the entire game, from start to finish.

  • Lenient rewind system that lets you roll back your decisions at any time.

  • Relaxing story-rich narrative... perfect for one-handed gameplay!

You are Captain Hale, a famous warhero... and infamous womanizer! Accompanying you is Meredith, your trusty sidekick and sexy half-elven paladin. Together you lead expeditions around the Legion Fort you both serve in, and enjoy each other's company when off duty...

Lewd Dungeon Runs is a cozy point-and-click visual novel with a casual playstyle and limited branching paths. So just sit back, relax, and enjoy the story as you guide your party through increasingly erotic and lust-fueled situations that often spiral into hot sex scenes!

As part of your dungeon-running, you'll explore multiple locations over the course of the game, and encounter a wide variety of fantasy (monster)girls who'll jump your bones if you play your cards right and charm your way into their hearts...

PoV, Vaginal Sex, Anal Sex, Oral Sex (Fellatio, Deepthroat, Cunnilingus, Analingus), Big Ass, Big Tits, Creampie, Male Domination, Female Domination, Romance, Feet Worship, Stockings, Footjob, Handjob, MILF, Master/Mistress Roleplay, Teasing, Dirty Talk, Titfuck, Fantasy Interracial (Raceplay), Group Sex, Lactation, Scent Play / Saliva, Gloryhole(s), Female Ejaculation, Breeding / Impregnation, Demons & Monstergirls, Masturbation

NOTE: All lewd content in the game is optional; sex scenes are gated behind confirmation prompts for easy engagement or skipping. All characters are consenting adults (18+).

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 德文*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo (or better)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 / DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4 or up
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 / Kernel 3.x / +
  • 處理器: Dual Core+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
